heading: Tonight
text: Becoming cloudy, with snow developing west to east after midnight. Lows in the 20s north to near 30 south. Winds light and variable.

heading: Sunday
text: Snow likely from Rt. 4 north, with light to moderate accumulations. Snow mixed with rain south, turning into rain in the southern valleys. Highs in the 30s north, upper 30s to mid 40s south. Light south wind turning east.

heading: Sunday Night
text: Snow showers, mixing with rain south, turning completely over to snow as temperatures drop. Lows in the 20s north to near 30 south. North wind at 5 to 10 mph.
